<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Strategy\ContainerCommands\Functions; use Predis\Command\Strategy\SubcommandStrategyInterface; class LoadStrategy implements SubcommandStrategyInterface { /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function processArguments(array $arguments): array { if (count($arguments) <= 2) { return $arguments; } $processedArguments = [$arguments[0]]; $replace = array_pop($arguments); if (is_bool($replace) && $replace) { $processedArguments[] = 'REPLACE'; } elseif (!is_bool($replace)) { $processedArguments[] = $replace; } $processedArguments[] = $arguments[1]; return $processedArguments; } }
